devdoc.details: Signature payload is expected to be abi.encode(Order, r, s, v).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

ORDER_TYPEHASH.details: Matches GPv2Order.TYPE_HASH (kind/balance are string types per EIP-712).

getMessageSigner(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32.notice: returns 0x0 address if the signature is invalid.

hashOrder((address,address,address,uint2.notice: Public helper for computing CoW order hashes.

isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).notice: EIP-1271 signature check used by CoW Protocol's settlement.

userdoc.notice: EIP-1271 validator for CoW Protocol orders used in token harvesting flows.
